---
title: "The Rev. Matthew Calley Morton"
---

## The Rev. Matthew Calley Morton

**Dates:** (1817/18-1850)

### Description

Warden of St. Columba’s College

### Biography

He may be the subwarden of St. Columba's referred to.

### Letters

- Letter from May 14, 1848

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
